children.text: Animals are an important part of our lives, and my favourite animal is the panda.
Pandas have black and white fur, which makes them look very special.
children.cn: 熊猫有黑白相间的毛，这让它们看起来非常特别。

children.text: I love them because they are not only cute but also quite smart.
children.cn: 我喜欢它们，因为它们不仅可爱而且非常聪明。

children.text: They are from China and usually live in the bamboo forests.
children.cn: 它们来自中国，通常生活在竹林里。
动物是我们生活中重要的一部分，我最喜欢的动物是熊猫。

children.text: However, these amazing animals are in danger for several reasons.
For example, people cut down too many trees in the forests where they live.
children.cn: 例如，人们在他们居住的森林里砍伐了太多的树木。

children.text: As a result, they lose their homes and have less food to eat.
children.cn: 结果，它们失去了家园，食物也越来越少。
然而，这些奇妙的动物正因为一些原因而面临危险。

children.text: It is important for us to protect pandas as well as other animals.
We can help them by saving the forests and not killing animals.
children.cn: 我们可以通过保护森林和不杀害动物来帮助它们。

children.text: Since animals are our best friends, we should take good care of them.
children.cn: 既然动物是我们最好的朋友，我们就应该好好照顾它们。
保护熊猫以及其他动物对我们来说很重要。
